problem: How to desalinate seawater at dramatically lower energy cost than reverse osmosis?
mechanism: Biochar amendment for soil carbon sequestration
hypothesis: How to desalinate seawater at dramatically lower energy cost than reverse osmosis? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Biochar. Biochar amendment for soil carbon sequestration directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Life cycle assessment with 2 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
